faqs.question: Why are crickets so common in Lindenhurst homes?
faqs.answer: Lindenhurst's coastal location and humid Long Island climate create perfect conditions for crickets. They're attracted to moisture, vegetation, and outdoor lighting common in residential areas. Crickets often enter homes through cracks, gaps around doors and windows, and foundation openings seeking warmth and shelter, especially in fall months.

faqs.question: What does your cricket control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection to identify cricket entry points and harborage areas, targeted treatment using EPA-approved products, exterior perimeter protection, exclusion recommendations to seal entry points, and a follow-up visit if needed. We also provide prevention tips to keep crickets from returning.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in my Lindenhurst home?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations show significant reduction within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within one week. The timeline depends on the severity of the infestation and environmental conditions. Our technicians will assess your specific situation and provide a realistic timeline during the initial inspection.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products that are highly effective against crickets while being safe for humans and pets when applied according to label directions. Our technicians are trained in integrated pest management techniques that minimize chemical use while maximizing results. We can also discuss additional eco-friendly options if you have specific concerns.
